name: Empty State
useCase: Shown inside the app shell whenever a list, table, or content area has no data to display. Covers three triggers: no items exist yet (zero state), no search/filter results (no match), or an error preventing data load (error state). Use this pattern as a slot inside any list view to handle the empty case gracefully.
layout: App shell with sidebar and tabs. Centered empty state content (icon + heading + body + CTA) fills the main content area.
